---
title: "Jakub Sobotka"
description: "Toegepaste wiskunde student." 
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
  <nav aria-label="Main navigation">
    <a href="#hero">Home</a><span class="sep" aria-hidden="true">/</span>
    <a href="#about">Over Mij</a><span class="sep" aria-hidden="true">/</span>
    <a href="#skills">Skills</a><span class="sep" aria-hidden="true">/</span>
    <a href="#projects">Data Lab</a><span class="sep" aria-hidden="true">/</span>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </nav>

  <main>

    <section id="hero">
      <div class="hero-grid">
        
        <div class="hero-text">
          <div class="hero-name">
            <span>JAKUB</span>
            <span>SOBOTKA</span>
          </div>
          <p class="hero-tag">
            <span class="highlight">TOEGEPASTE WISKUNDE</span> &mdash;
            BOUWEN AAN:
            <span class="highlight">DATA SCIENCE</span>,
            <span class="highlight">MACHINE LEARNING</span>,
            <span class="highlight">DUURSPORT</span>.
          </p>  
          <div class="hero-meta">
            <span>AMSTERDAM</span>
            <span>HOGESCHOOL VAN AMSTERDAM</span>
            <span>DATA LAB</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-visual">
          <img src="images/3.jpg" alt="Jakub Sobotka" class="hero-img">
        </div>

      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="about">
      <h2 class="section-label">Over Mij</h2>
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div class="about-text">
          <p>
            Student <strong>Toegepaste Wiskunde (Applied Mathematics)</strong> aan de Hogeschool van Amsterdam. 
            Ik werk met data, modelleer het wiskundig en bouw systemen die patronen zichtbaar maken.
          </p>
          <p>
            Mijn projecten focussen zich sterk op fysiologische data. Ik bouw machine learning modellen op mijn eigen trainingsdata. Naast het programmeren ben ik een duursport atleet, in training voor aankomende ultra-marathons (170+km) and de Ironman Klagenfurt.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="about-stats">
          <div class="stat-item">
            <span class="stat-val">170km</span>
            <span class="stat-label">Doel: Polen Ultra</span>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-item">
            <span class="stat-val">Python</span>
            <span class="stat-label">Primary Stack</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="skills">
      <h2 class="section-label">Skills</h2>
      <div class="skills-grid">
        <div class="skill-group">
          <h3>Talen & Code</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Python</li>
            <li>R</li>
            <li>LaTeX</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <h3>Tools & Platforms</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>Jupyter Lab</li>
            <li>Quarto</li>
            <li>Git / GitHub</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="projects">
      <h2 class="section-label">Data Lab & Projecten</h2>
      <div class="projects-list">

        <div class="project-item">
          <span class="project-num" aria-hidden="true">01</span>
          <div class="project-info">
            <h3>Hardloopdata Netwerk</h3>
            <p>
              Een eerste introductie tot Python om mijn persoonlijke hardloopprestaties te voorspellen en visualiseren op basis van mijn eigen Garmin-data.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div class="project-meta">
            <span class="project-tech">Python / Machine Learning</span>
            <a href="datalab.html" class="project-link" aria-label="Bekijk project">Bekijk Project <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span></a>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="contact">
      <h2 class="section-label">Contact</h2>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/SobotaNedziela" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
          GitHub <span class="arrow" aria-hidden="true">↗</span>
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:sobotka.data@gmail.com">
          Email <span class="arrow" aria-hidden="true">↗</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </section>

  </main>

  <footer>
    <span>© 2026 Jakub Sobotka</span>
    <span>Built with Quarto & Python</span>
  </footer>

```
